# Second Act Labs

> A one-person software studio. Every product built because it had to exist. Software, taken personally.

## Products

### GenCatalog
The permanent memory for AI creation. Keeps every image, video, prompt and setting from AI tools (Midjourney, Grok Imagine, Gemini, GPT Image and more) in a local library you own, on your own disk. Mac and Windows. $99/year.
[gencatalog.app](https://gencatalog.app)

### Fieldnote (in development, 2026)
A private, watch-first voice journal. Speak into your Apple Watch on a walk; come home to on-device transcripts and quiet reflections — an AI editor that notices patterns and never gives advice. Local-first; nothing leaves your devices.

## About

Second Act Labs is an independent, one-person software studio. The founder's first act was spent around other people's ideas — A&R, venture capital, startups; the second act began in his 40s, building his own. Anonymous founder, shipping in public.

- [Website](https://secondactlabs.com)
